# Quaternius Cars Pack

This folder contains the selected SUV model from Quaternius' Cars Pack.

The original pack is CC0 1.0 and includes FBX, OBJ, and Blend files. The prototype uses `OBJ/SUV_BodyOnly.obj`, a local body-only derivative of `OBJ/SUV.obj` with the source model's fixed wheel faces removed so the Unity WheelCollider-driven wheels remain visible and animated.

Source: https://quaternius.com/packs/cars.html
